focus: A8-deepen: settle severity of gemini-removal dangling refs (orchestrate.md:21 reachability) + reassess _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET parity

findingDetails.title: Dangling .gemini/agents/ pointers in Claude+Codex agent mirrors after gemini-removal (8683890935)
findingDetails.evidence: No code resolves agent dir by profile (grep '.claude/agents' = only test/playbook + frontmatter reads); no code reads .gemini/agents (0 hits); .gemini/ deleted (ls = No such file or directory); commit 8683890935 --name-only touched no .claude/.codex agents; orchestrate.md:21 self-rule 'Choose the active runtime directory once per workflow' -> Claude runtime selects .claude/agents/, Gemini branch unselectable; .codex/agents/orchestrate.toml has NO gemini line
findingDetails.recommendation: Re-sync .claude/agents/ + .codex/agents/ mirrors post-removal: drop the deleted-.gemini/agents/ rows. Hand to maintainability iter 12-13.
findingDetails.findingClass: doc/config drift in READ-ONLY runtime mirrors
findingDetails.scopeProof: 7 file:line hits; commit name-only diff proves mirrors un-resynced; reachability grep proves inert
findingDetails.affectedSurfaceHints: Claude+Codex agent mirror regen/packaging step after OpenCode canonical edit
findingDetails.claim: orchestrate.md:21 'Gemini profile reads .gemini/agents/' is inert documentation drift, NOT a live router that fails/misroutes
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: searched all *.cjs/js/ts/sh/json/toml for any agent-router/parser resolving dir by profile or reading .claude/agents/*.md as routing data and for any reader of .gemini/agents -> none; searched all configs for a Gemini agent-runtime/profile registration -> none
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: P1 'live router that would fail/misroute' -- REFUTED: no execution path resolves .gemini/agents/, no LLM under non-Gemini runtime selects the Gemini branch, deleted Gemini harness cannot select it
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: at P2 floor for mirror-only drift; rises to P1 ONLY if a live Gemini agent-runtime is re-wired to resolve agents from .gemini/agents/

findingDetails.title: _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET (+_NOTE_TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET) single-owner note missing from .codex/config.toml + .devin/config.json
findingDetails.evidence: _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET present in opencode.json:32 + .claude/mcp.json:22, absent in codex/devin (0 hits each); BUT both configs co-host both socket owners (codex: 5 spec-memory/7 advisor; devin: 4/6) AND the load-bearing value HF_EMBED_SERVER_URL is IDENTICAL for both services in both configs: codex 67 (spec-memory)==108 (advisor)=unix:///tmp/mk-hf-embed/hf-embed.sock; devin 16==43=same -> single-owner invariant satisfied in fact
findingDetails.recommendation: Fan canonical _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET + _NOTE_TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET into .codex/config.toml (TOML form) + .devin/config.json during MCP-config maintenance for parity + future-edit protection.
findingDetails.findingClass: cross-runtime config doc parity gap (advisory _NOTE_ only)
findingDetails.scopeProof: presence diff opencode/claude (have) vs codex/devin (absent); value diff HF_EMBED_SERVER_URL identical across both services in both configs
findingDetails.affectedSurfaceHints: MCP config maintenance step that fans canonical _NOTE_* set into codex/devin configs
findingDetails.claim: missing _NOTE_HF_EMBED_SOCKET in codex/devin is a documentation gap, NOT a latent misconfig; operator mis-run risk is LOW because the invariant value already holds
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: checked actual HF_EMBED_SERVER_URL values for mk-spec-memory vs mk_skill_advisor in codex+devin -> identical string in all 4 -> invariant satisfied; confirmed both configs DO co-host both owners (refutes iter-009 notApplicable hedge)
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: latent misconfig risking a second model-server owner -- REJECTED: the two socket values are already identical and visibly adjacent; operator would have to actively diverge them; missing prose only removes the warning, not the correct value
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: would rise to P1 only if the two HF_EMBED_SERVER_URL values were found diverged -- they are not

noveltyJustification: No new findings. Both pre-existing P2 advisories (F-A8-01, F-A8-02) refined/settled with reachability + invariant proofs; severity unchanged (both P2). weightedNew=0, weightedRefinement=2*0.5*1(P2)=1.0 over weightedTotal; per rule no-new-P0 -> ratio reported 0.0 as deepen-only refinement.
